title: G&P Narrow Gauge Texel Pack
description: Narrow gauge resource pack for Immersive Railroading mod in texel style
body:
__Geniu1999 & PeterTheRam Narrow Gauge Texel__ Pack is a resource pack for the Immersive Railroading mod that adds Polish narrow gauge railway rolling stock and tracks to the game.

All models that can be found in the resource pack are made in Texel style with 16px textures, which allows to keep the Minecraft graphic style. In addition, the models have interactive elements and their own crafting, which means you can use it in survival world.

This resource pack requires the __test version__ of the Immersive Railroading mod, which can be found pinned in the #test-builds channel on the official Immersive Railroading Discord server.



__Current rolling stock included in the pack:__

 __Locomotives:__
* Lxd2 785/750mm.
* Lyd1 785/750mm
* T49 Ryś 750mm
* TKb27 Ryś 785mm
* Tw53 785mm

 __Freight wagons:__
* Wddxh 750mm
* Swddxh 750mm
* Wddx 750mm
* K 750mm
* P 750mm
* W 750mm
* Kh 785mm
* Wh 785mm
* Ph 785mm
* wddxh 785mm/750mm

 __Tanker wagons:__
* Rh 785mm
